_comment: Deferred / planned work for GABES. Basics & current behaviour live in README.md; this file tracks things intentionally NOT done yet. Each item: {id, area, title, why, status}. status: deferred | in_progress | done.

items.title: Connect Rydberg probe/coupling beam power to the OBE drive
items.why: probe_power_uw / coupling_power_mw / beam_diameter_mm are display-only metadata today; the solve is driven by the fitted coupling_rabi_mhz / lo_rabi_mhz. An experimentalist sets beam power, not Rabi. Add beam-geometry -> intensity -> Rabi conversion so power sliders actually move the spectrum. Needs a calibrated 480 nm 5P->40D coupling dipole (and the probe stays weak-probe linear, so probe power would only scale readout, not the solve).

items.title: Replace calibrated biphoton estimate with a predictive model
items.why: PARTIAL (biphoton_model toggle, Predictive is the default). The biphoton WAVEFORM is now solved from first principles: Doppler-averaged cascade amplitude (Kim QST 9,045006 (2024) Eq.2; Du JOSAB 25,C98 (2008) Eq.15; Chen PRR 4,023132 (2022) Eq.3-5) with the Omega_c^2 Autler-Townes term in the two-photon denominator (not a weak-coupling drive), the collective velocity-class coherent sum, natural-linewidth decay (no injected emission_decay_ns), a waveform-derived source bandwidth, and the wavelength-dependent BTW width ORDERING (852-917 nm narrower than 852-795 nm). g2_SI(tau) is computed from |psi|^2 with physical accidentals (no added-accidental forcing in Predictive mode). STILL ANCHORED / APPROXIMATE: (a) absolute pair rate is reference-anchored with physical scaling (pump power, OD, phase matching) because the lumped 4-level model does not pin the absolute collection coefficient C -- same role as the squeezing line_strength residual; (b) absolute ns-widths are approximate (closed-form over-sensitivity in this regime; the extreme 780/1529 nm telecom ratio over-weights the natural-decay tail, Cs cascade channels land within ~30%); (c) OD waveform reshaping (Du/Chen rho-bar, GenericFWMSolver._apply_longitudinal_response) is implemented but OFF by default (param biphoton_od_reshaping) -- the lumped model overestimates high-OD group delay; (d) full quantum-Langevin noise (Kolchin PRA 75,033814 (2007)) is not modelled. Next: per-source Rabi/dephasing calibration for exact widths, and a Langevin noise channel.

items.title: Promote Ne buffer broadening to a gas/species/line table with pressure shift + Dicke narrowing
items.why: neon_buffer_broadening() is a fixed FWHM-per-Torr line only; pressure shift and Dicke narrowing are not modelled (see constants.py TODO). Generalise to a coefficient table when more buffer gases are exposed.
